body.title: T-adc-help-skill
body.result: /ADCHelp skill created — 31 skills organized by category, key flows, status icons, key paths; console or file output
body.description:
Create a /ADCHelp skill that outputs workflow reference documentation. Akien used to have a workflow_reference.md file in the tree, but it was lost during a recent edit session. Rather than keeping a manually-updated file, build a skill that generates the reference on demand.

Usage: `/ADCHelp` outputs to console; `/ADCHelp ~/tmp/workflow_reference.md` writes to a file. Content should cover the ADC tools Akien is building or using frequently (skills, MCP tools, device capabilities, common patterns).

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/adc-help/ (new skill directory)
**Design rules:** skills-are-tools; reference-lives-in-code (source references from CLAUDE.md, palace nodes, skills themselves)
**Scope boundary:** Workflow reference only — not a full manual. Keep it concise and link to fuller docs where they exist. In scope: common skill use patterns, MCP tool reference, ADC architecture snapshot. Out of scope: detailed tutorials (those live in docs/).
**Test plan:** Manual verification: /ADCHelp outputs useful content; file write preserves formatting; Akien confirms workflow patterns are current and helpful.
